about.title: Meet Arnaud, your drone pilot in Menorca.
about.p1: 8 Drones Menorca is Arnaud — a certified drone pilot based on the island. From real estate and hotels to weddings, events and holidays, he captures Menorca with a cinematic eye and a personal, hands-on approach.
about.p2: Every project is planned, filmed, edited and delivered with care — ready to publish. Clear communication, fast turnaround, and footage you'll be proud to share.

items.quote: Absolutely flawless and professional. We had three properties filmed and the result exceeded our expectations — stunning image quality and modern, dynamic editing. Arnaud is a certified pilot who knows how to showcase every property.
items.name: Escapada Menorca Conciergerie

items.quote: We hired 8 Drones Menorca to capture our wedding and it exceeded our expectations. The photos and videos are superb, and Arnaud is a real pleasure to work with — attentive and accommodating. Highly recommended!
items.name: Mathieu Gregori

items.quote: Remarkable work! The drone footage elevated our holiday in Menorca far beyond what we imagined — dynamic, elegant and genuinely moving, worthy of a professional film. A premium service.
items.name: Karim Snider
